## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `./scripts/community/check-capabilities.sh`
- [ ] `go test -tags goolm ./...`
- [ ] Documentation updated where required
- [ ] No credentials, private endpoints, customer data, proprietary code, or generated binaries included
- [ ] All commits include a DCO sign-off (`Signed-off-by`)

## Capability and security impact

State whether this changes payment capabilities, plugin permissions, key custody, order/payment state, settlement, external inputs, or public API compatibility. Link the accepted ADR when one is required.
